query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `content_review_log` (
  `id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `version` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `bump_type` enum('patch','minor','major') NOT NULL,
  `trigger_type` enum('quarterly_review','annual_review','regulatory_trigger','customer_trigger','operational_trigger','manual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  `trigger_detail` text,
  `author` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'David',
  `reviewer` varchar(100),
  `changes_json` text,
  `new_sources_json` text,
  `test_fixtures_json` text,
  `known_issues` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_crl_version` (`version`),
  KEY `idx_crl_created_at` (`created_at`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `triggered_reviews` (
  `id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `trigger_category` enum('regulatory','customer','operational') NOT NULL,
  `trigger_type` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `trigger_detail` text NOT NULL,
  `affected_content` text,
  `planned_review_date` varchar(10),
  `status` enum('open','in_review','resolved','deferred') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  `priority` enum('low','medium','high','critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  `resolved_at` timestamp NULL,
  `resolved_by_user_id` varchar(36),
  `resolution_notes` text,
  `linked_review_log_id` varchar(36),
  `created_by_user_id` varchar(36),
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_tr_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_tr_category` (`trigger_category`),
  KEY `idx_tr_created_at` (`created_at`)
);
